_readme: Edit this file to white-label MenuFlows. Run 'npm run build' then deploy. No other files need changing.

_fields.company.name: Shown in header and legal pages. Use your agency or client name.
_fields.company.supportEmail: Shown in Privacy Policy and Terms footer.
_fields.company.domain: Your deployment domain. Used in legal pages and QR generator.
_fields.colors.primary: Hex color for buttons, accents, and active nav states.
_fields.colors.darkBg: Main dark background for owner/staff views. #170e10 = wine dark.
_fields.colors.cardBg: Card surface color in owner views.
